query: heavy fog mist obscured figure barely visible silhouette
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/fog_silhouette — anti_aesthetic — figures lost in mist, dissolved silhouettes, monochrome haze

response.objective_caption: A sailboat with a single tall mast floats on calm water surrounded by dense fog. The photograph is in black and white. The boat appears as a dark shape positioned toward the right side of the frame, with a faint reflection visible beneath it on the water. Small points of reflected light scatter across the lower left corner of the water surface. The horizon is obscured, causing the sky and water to blend into a continuous gray field.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A sailboat with a single tall mast floats on calm water surrounded by dense fog, rendered in muted, faded black and white with oppressively low contrast. Flat lighting from the heavy fog eliminates directional light and shadows, collapsing depth into a suffocating gray atmosphere where sky and water blend into an indistinguishable field. The vessel appears as a dark silhouette with minimal surface detail and a faint reflection, while small points of light glimmer across the lower left corner of the water, contributing to a pervasive mood of atmospheric distress and isolation.
